synced:
[00:16.87] Loving can hurt

[00:28.50] That I know
[00:31.72] 
[00:34.41] And when it gets hard
[00:38.49] You know it can get hard sometimes
[00:43.41] It is the only thing that makes us feel alive
[00:50.38] 
[00:53.62] We keep this love in a photograph
[00:58.00] We make these memories for ourselves
[01:01.63] Where our eyes are never closing
[01:04.26] Hearts are never broken
[01:06.50] And time's forever frozen still
[01:10.12] So you can keep me
[01:13.43] Inside the pocket of your ripped jeans
[01:17.85] Holdin' me closer 'til our eyes meet
[01:22.22] You won't ever be alone
[01:26.86] Wait for me to come home
[01:30.11] 
[01:32.30] Loving can heal
[01:36.79] Loving can mend your soul
[01:41.25] And is the only thing

[01:49.59] I swear it will get easier
[01:53.25] Remember that with every piece of ya, mmm

[02:06.40] 
[02:09.24] We keep this love in a photograph
[02:13.84] We make these memories for ourselves
[02:17.25] Where our eyes are never closing

[02:37.82] You won't ever be alone

[02:51.17] Inside these pages you just hold me

[03:00.18] Wait for me to come home
[03:04.62] Wait for me to come home
[03:08.92] Wait for me to come home
[03:13.48] Wait for me to come home
[03:19.28] Oh, you can fit me
[03:21.50] Inside the necklace you got when you were 16
[03:26.60] Next to your heartbeat where I should be
[03:31.16] Keep it deep within your soul
[03:37.03] And if you hurt me
[03:39.96] Well, that's okay, baby, only words bleed
[03:44.52] Inside these pages you just hold me
[03:48.95] And I won't ever let you go
[03:54.55] When I'm away

[04:06.76] Hearing you whisper through the phone
[04:11.17] Wait for me to come home

plain:
Loving can hurt
Loving can hurt sometimes
But it's the only thing
That I know

And when it gets hard
You know it can get hard sometimes
It is the only thing that makes us feel alive

We keep this love in a photograph
We make these memories for ourselves
Where our eyes are never closing
Hearts are never broken
And time's forever frozen still

So you can keep me
Inside the pocket of your ripped jeans
Holdin' me closer 'til our eyes meet
You won't ever be alone
Wait for me to come home

Loving can heal
Loving can mend your soul
And is the only thing
That I know, know
I swear it will get easier
Remember that with every piece of ya, mmm
And it's the only thing we take with us when we die, mmm
